nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as final decision-maker or executor
nodes.grounding_span: I use it frequently in helping me come up with ideas and refining the first or second draft of written content

nodes.label: AI as research starting point
nodes.label_negative: AI for sensitive or confidential information
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to help me identify what competitors are doing in that space and what they've created

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability for simple analytical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I needed AI to help me analyze some data...the AI kept making errors

nodes.label: AI as knowledge resource for unfamiliar domains
nodes.label_negative: AI as unhelpful or irrelevant in unfamiliar domains
nodes.grounding_span: When I explained generally what I was looking for, the AI produced super helpful resources

nodes.label: AI as marketing content generator
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to entry-level jobs
nodes.grounding_span: I have a lot of routine tasks that would be great to automate with some prompt engineering

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacing human creativity and strategy
nodes.grounding_span: I enjoy strategy and creation, both of which need a lot of human input

nodes.label: Creative autonomy
nodes.grounding_span: When it comes to final execution of creative content I would prefer to do that myself

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: It cut down my time on that task by hours I'd say

nodes.label: Understanding and knowledge acquisition
nodes.grounding_span: It was on an area in finance that I am not very familiar with...the AI produced super helpful resources

nodes.label: Privacy and data security
nodes.grounding_span: I don't want to put any sensitive company information on there

nodes.label: Career advancement and relevance
nodes.grounding_span: I am at the manager level so it will only augment my career

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: One time that I was very satisfied was when I was helping a colleague create content

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors
nodes.grounding_span: That was frustrating because it was just counting sums and grouping lists

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI integration
nodes.grounding_span: I anticipate that I will continue to use it even more

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: When it comes to final execution of creative content I would prefer to do that myself

nodes.label: Structured iterative refinement — breaks brainstorming into stages
nodes.grounding_span: I'll go back and forth when I'm close to finishing something...I use batch approach when I'm early in the brainstorming

nodes.label: Privacy-conscious task segmentation — separates sensitive from non-sensitive work
nodes.grounding_span: I can't use it much past preliminary stages right now because I don't want to put any sensitive company information on there
